name: PipeStone Golf Club
about: PipeStone Golf Club is an 18-hole, par 72 championship facility owned by the City of Miamisburg and operated by Hampton Golf Management. The course was designed by world-renowned architect Arthur Hills, known for its rolling terrain, undulating greens, and over 100 feet in elevation changes, offering a challenge for all skill levels while preserving the natural beauty of the land. The venue features a driving range, short-game practice areas, indoor TrackMan simulators, a pro shop, and dining options, making it a comprehensive golf destination for casual play, events, and serious practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan indoor golf simulator technology for year-round practice
Renowned Arthur Hills-designed course with challenging yet playable layout
Variety of membership programs and reciprocal access options
Comprehensive practice facilities including driving range and short-game areas
Flexible event hosting for tournaments, weddings, and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: 1818 Grill offers casual and fine dining with customizable menus for events
Full bar service available at 1818 Grill and for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for indoor golf simulation

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience, though club rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers an on-site restaurant and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically takes 1.5-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf lessons and family-friendly amenities with a welcoming atmosphere.
